creator: bryan@shatow.net
text:
multimedia/fxtv is missing the distinfo file. The port was previously deleted but then restored, and the distinfo was missed.

Fix: Fix restores distinfo from the Attic: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/multimedia/fxtv/Attic/distinfo?rev=1.13;content-type=text%2Fplain;hideattic=0
How-To-Repeat: 	make -C /usr/ports/multimedia/fxtv checksum
